name: The Golf Grid
address: 4653 St Joe Ave Unit A-109, Post Falls, ID 83854
about: The Golf Grid is a premier indoor golf destination offering 24/7 access to advanced golf simulator technology. The facility operates on a membership-only basis, providing a simple and straightforward model for unlimited play. It is equipped with GSPro software and cutting-edge simulators, catering to golfers in Post Falls, Spokane Valley, Liberty Lake, Coeur d'Alene, and Hayden. The venue focuses on a members-only experience with professional instruction available from Joshua Grenier, a Class A PGA Professional with over 10 years of experience. Membership options start at $150 per month for unlimited access, with additional add-ons like weekly lessons available.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited 24/7 access to premium GSPro simulators with a vast library of courses updated weekly
Simple, affordable membership model starting at $150/month for unlimited play
Access to professional instruction from a Class A PGA Professional for skill development

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food service available
No information about alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge simulator technology with GSPro software, specific hardware brand not mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for this information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, and no information about BYOB policies is provided.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes. This information may vary depending on simulator availability and number of players.

faq.question: Is The Golf Grid kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly as it mentions offering instruction for juniors and families, and coaching content is aimed at golfers of all ages and skill levels.
